testcase.name: testGenerateTokenWithAllParameters
testcase.system-out: 12:49:02.617 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token request - grant_type: password, client_id: test-client 12:49:02.617 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token request details - username: testuser, scope: read write, roles: admin,user,developer 12:49:02.617 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Looking up user 'testuser' in JSON user repository 12:49:02.617 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Using roles from request parameter for user 'testuser': admin,user,developer 12:49:02.617 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Using roles for token: [admin, user, developer] 12:49:02.620 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token generated successfully for client: test-client, user: testuser, roles: admin,user,developer

testcase.name: testJWTExpirationTime
testcase.system-out: 12:49:02.624 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token request - grant_type: password, client_id: test-client 12:49:02.624 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token request details - username: testuser, scope: , roles: 12:49:02.624 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Looking up user 'testuser' in JSON user repository 12:49:02.624 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Priority 3: User 'testuser' found in JSON but has no roles assigned, using default roles: user 12:49:02.624 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Using roles for token: [user] 12:49:02.626 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token generated successfully for client: test-client, user: testuser, roles: user

testcase.name: testGenerateTokenWithSingleRole
testcase.system-out: 12:49:02.630 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token request - grant_type: password, client_id: test-client 12:49:02.630 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token request details - username: testuser, scope: , roles: admin 12:49:02.630 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Looking up user 'testuser' in JSON user repository 12:49:02.630 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Using roles from request parameter for user 'testuser': admin 12:49:02.630 [main] DEBUG c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - Using roles for token: [admin] 12:49:02.632 [main] INFO c.m.h.undertow.OAuthTokenHandler - OAuth token generated successfully for client: test-client, user: testuser, roles: admin

testcase.name: testMissingRequiredParameters

testcase.name: testIssuerConsistency
